articles.title: US military kills two more people in strike on alleged drug boat in Pacific
articles.description:
Small boat destroyed in video posted on social media as US campaign has killed at least 178 people since September
The US military announced on Friday that it killed two people in an attack on a boat in the eastern Pacific, part of a series of deadly strikes on vessels in recent months which it claims are targeting “narco-trafficking” operations.
The US Southern Command declared in a social media post on X that Gen Francis L Donovan directed Joint Task Force Southern Spear, the counter-narcotics unit that operates in the region, to carry out a lethal strike. The US military posted a video, which it labeled unclassified, showing a small boat being destroyed in an explosion.

articles.title: XChat, the standalone app for messaging on X, is available on iOS now
articles.description:
XChat, the standalone app for accessing X's messaging feature, is available to download now for iOS. X first suggested it would be stripping direct messaging from X in 2025, but at least for now, XChat is available in the original X app, the web and this new app.
Based on its launch video, the new XChat app offers many of the elements of modern messaging X had already introduced to its chats feature, like the ability to delete and edit messages, block screenshots and send disappearing messages. The new XChat app also supports video and audio calls, and X claims that all messages sent with XChat are end-to-end encrypted.
XChat will also be expected to be the home of any groups that formed around X's Communities feature. The social platform recently announced that it was retiring Communities at the end of May, and suggested that XChat's support for larger group chats could be a worthwhile alternative. XChat's group chats can currently have 350 participants, but X plans to expand that number in the future.

The everything app, which requires 3 apps to use the core product. pic.twitter.com/1aJF4n2par
— camol (@camolNFT) April 23, 2026
Elon Musk's original pitch after he rebranded Twitter as X, was to turn the platform into an "everything app," where things like an algorithmic feed, messaging, job boards and even payments could exist side-by-side. A standalone messaging app seems like the exact opposite of that, but it might also reflect where X finds itself in 2026. The company is now a subsidiary of xAI, and xAI itself is part of SpaceX. Musk's push into AI appears to be the going concern, and cloning something like WeChat might just be less important.
This article originally appeared on Engadget at https://www.engadget.com/apps/xchat-the-standalone-app-for-messaging-on-x-is-available-on-ios-now-214826886.html?src=rss

articles.title: MIKE DAVIS: Southern Poverty Law Center: A tale of a racism scam
articles.description: The SPLC is accused of funding the KKK and fueling racial hatred while raising millions by claiming to fight racism, a new indictment alleges.

articles.title: Newly appointed Niti Aayog vice chairman meets PM Modi
articles.description: Ashok Lahiri is amongst India's most experienced and senior economists with a career over four decades

articles.title: RBL Bank Q4 Results: Profit soars 3x YoY to Rs 230 crore
articles.description: RBL Bank reported a significant three-fold surge in net profit for the fourth quarter, reaching Rs 230 crore, driven by robust business expansion and improved asset quality. The bank's net advances grew 23% year-on-year, with retail segment contributing substantially. Despite a dip in net interest margin, the bank's overall financial performance showed strong growth.

articles.title: Who are Bnei Manashe? About the Jewish community in India that Israel is getting back home
articles.description: Members of Bnei Menashe, a Jewish community that has long resided in India's Northeast, largely in Manipur and Mizoram, recently arrived in Israel.

articles.title: ED conducts raids at Raheja Developers premises in NCR in money laundering case
articles.description: Approximately seven Delhi-NCR locations are currently being searched, ED officials said

articles.title: Reliance Industries becomes first Indian firm to cross $10 billion annual profit
articles.description: Reliance Industries achieved a record net profit of Rs 95,610 crore in FY26, becoming the first Indian company to surpass $10 billion in annual profit. Despite a quarterly dip due to the oil-to-chemicals segment, RIL's consumer businesses, including Jio and Reliance Retail, showed robust growth, with retail crossing 20,000 stores.

articles.title: Foreign travel blogger criticises filthy Tamil Nadu beach, says ‘upper-class Indians’ litter without concern
articles.description: Calling the condition of the beach ‘shameful,’ he said it is shocking that people in the country do not pick up their own trash. He added that it was ‘the most trashed beach that I have ever seen in my entire life.’

articles.title: 'Beaten up, threatened...': After joining BJP, Swati Maliwal recalls 2024 assault at Kejriwal's house
articles.description: Rajya Sabha MP Swati Maliwal, now with the BJP, revealed she was intimidated and threatened after alleging an assault by an AAP aide at Kejriwal's residence in 2024. She claimed immense pressure to withdraw her FIR, leading to her being sidelined by the party. Maliwal also criticized AAP's governance in Punjab and praised PM Modi's leadership.

topStories.title: MIKE DAVIS: Southern Poverty Law Center: A tale of a racism scam
topStories.description: The SPLC is accused of funding the KKK and fueling racial hatred while raising millions by claiming to fight racism, a new indictment alleges.

topStories.title: Emails reveal reality TV crew’s behind-the-scenes access to sheriff now leading Nancy Guthrie probe
topStories.description: Emails obtained reveal Pima County Sheriff's Department cooperated extensively with reality TV crew, sharing bodycam footage of arrests and incidents.

topStories.title: King Charles' food preferences revealed by former royal chef ahead of Trump's White House state dinner
topStories.description: King Charles and Queen Camilla will be treated to "the best" of American cuisine at Trump's White House state banquet, former royal chef Darren McGrady told Fox News Digital.

topStories.title: Trump’s plan for $500 million Spirit Airline bailout draws GOP division
topStories.description: The president said this week that buying the bankrupt airline would save jobs but his administration is divided.

topStories.title: Democrats could actually retake the Senate. Here are the races to watch.
topStories.description: The map still favors Republicans, but Trump’s declining popularity --- particularly on the economy --- makes Democrats’ once long-shot bid to retake the Senate more feasible than ever before.

topStories.title: US turns to drones after retiring minesweepers to reopen Strait of Hormuz amid Iran crisis
topStories.description: The U.S. is racing to reopen the Strait of Hormuz as Iran reportedly lays mines in the critical waterway, testing the Navy's shift to unmanned systems.

topStories.title: While California's tourism rallied, L.A. faced its worst year since the pandemic
topStories.description: Travel spending shrank slightly in Los Angeles County last year as local crises drove away tourists and national policy alienated foreign visitors.

topStories.title: NASCAR fans pack into Talladega Superspeedway ahead of Sunday's Jack Links 500 race
topStories.description: Talladega Superspeedway attracts visitors from "all 50 states and multiple countries" every year for during race season, according to track officials.

topStories.title: ‘US cares only about its own well-being’: Russia's Lavrov slams America, says actions in Iran, Venezuela centered on oil
topStories.description: Sergei Lavrov said Washington, in its dealings with Latin America and the Middle East, was “taking us back to a world where nothing existed” in international law.

topStories.title: Another military firing, and 'Mormon Wives' expands to a new location: The news quiz
topStories.description: A storied tech CEO steps down, the NFL crowns a new class, and a budget airline looks for a bailout.

topStories.title: Trump Seeks to Abolish Iran’s Atomic Stockpile, a Problem He Helped Create
topStories.description: President Trump withdrew from the Obama-era nuclear accord in 2018, saying it was the worst deal ever. But Iran responded with an enrichment spree that haunts the negotiations to this day.

topStories.title: Michigan governor hopeful pressed on past SPLC work after DOJ indictment: 'What did Jocelyn know?'
topStories.description: Michigan Secretary of State Jocelyn Benson faces GOP pressure over her past SPLC ties after the group was indicted on fraud-related charges this week.

dailyNews.title: Firm Building Trump’s Ballroom Got a Secret No-Bid Contract for a Nearby Job
dailyNews.description: The National Park Service increased the value of the contract several times over and then awarded it to Maryland-based Clark Construction, in a process that experts said was highly unusual.

dailyNews.title: Mike Tyson, Trump watches and meme coins: Crypto takes over Mar-a-Lago
dailyNews.description: Top holders of Donald Trump’s meme coin will get a conference at Mar-a-Lago, featuring Trump-branded swag and potential facetime, even as the coin has lost value.

dailyNews.title: Trump eager to show off latest White House project to King Charles
dailyNews.description: The president’s black granite path is the newest change to the West Wing, following gold lettering, Oval Office gilding and a “Presidential Walk of Fame.”

dailyNews.title: Trump’s political headwinds pile up after gerrymandering, Iran setbacks
dailyNews.description: New polls showed voters prefer Democrats on the economy for the first time since 2010 and Republicans disapprove of Trump’s handling of inflation.

dailyNews.title: Some Planned Parenthood clinics are using Botox to smooth over federal cuts
dailyNews.description: After President Trump and Congress cut certain Medicaid funding to Planned Parenthood in last year's budget, some clinics have started offering aesthetic services, including Botox, to stay afloat.

dailyNews.title: Top Iranian and Pakistani officials meet in Islamabad
dailyNews.description: Iran’s FM Abbas Araghchi is in Islamabad for talks with Pakistani officials, as US envoys are also set to arrive.

dailyNews.title: Iran says no meeting with U.S. negotiators planned in Pakistan, with Trump envoys due to head to Islamabad
dailyNews.description: U.S. special envoy Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner are expected to arrive in Islamabad on Saturday.

dailyNews.title: On Iran’s Border, Cooking Oil Trade Is a Snapshot of the Country’s Struggles
dailyNews.description: The war has exacerbated Iran’s economic crisis, forcing many to cross the border into Turkey to buy the most basic goods.

dailyNews.title: Iran's foreign minister awaits U.S. delegation to Pakistan for peace talks
dailyNews.description: Iran's Abbas Araghchi arrived in Islamabad on Friday, as the White House confirmed Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner will travel there Saturday to try to "move the ball forward towards a deal."

dailyNews.title: Rubio’s Absence From Iran Talks Highlights Stay-at-Home Role
dailyNews.description: President Trump has outsourced much of his diplomacy to others, while Mr. Rubio focuses on his second job as national security adviser.

dailyNews.title: Witkoff, Kushner to take part in second round of Iran peace talks in Pakistan
dailyNews.description: While the U.S. sends representatives to Islamabad, Israel's fight with Hezbollah continues despite a ceasefire.

dailyNews.title: U.S. Says Venezuelan Government Can Pay for Nicolás Maduro’s Defense
dailyNews.description: The issue had been hanging over the former Venezuelan leader’s federal criminal case for weeks. Last month, a judge indicated that he was skeptical of the U.S. government’s rationale for blocking the funds.

dailyNews.title: Justice Department to allow firing squads for executions in move to ramp up capital punishment
dailyNews.description: The Justice Department will adopt firing squad as a permitted method of execution as the Trump administration moves to ramp up and expedite capital punishment cases.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iran is ‘making an offer’
dailyNews.description: President Trump said that Iran is ‘making an offer’ to the U.S. Meanwhile, Iran’s foreign minister arrived in Pakistan, but said negotiations with the U.S. were not scheduled. NBC News’ Keir Simmons reports.

dailyNews.title: The ‘Lasting Damage’ of Pirro’s Investigation of the Federal Reserve and Powell
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration’s attacks on the Federal Reserve have rattled confidence in the central bank’s ability to operate independently before a leadership transition.

dailyNews.title: Trump will ‘deliver’: RNC chair signals midterms confidence despite ‘doom and gloom’
dailyNews.description: RNC Chair Joe Gruters says he believes Republicans are on track to defy history and defend their slim congressional majorities in the 2026 midterms.

dailyNews.title: DC murder rate sees astonishing turnaround as Trump team credits federal crackdown
dailyNews.description: Washington, D.C., homicides have dropped by roughly half in 2026 compared to 2025, sparking debate over Trump's federal crackdown and broader trends.

dailyNews.title: Dems put Trump on notice as redistricting battle ramps up ahead of midterms: 'Going to fight back'
dailyNews.description: Democrats claim President Trump started the redistricting battle and vow to fight back as Virginia's referendum shifts the 2026 midterm landscape.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Dislikes Prediction Markets. His Family Invests in Them.
dailyNews.description: The White House has warned staff not to wager on government decisions, but his family’s involvement with these firms undermines the president’s message.

dailyNews.title: Under Trump, Green Card Seekers Face New Scrutiny for Views on Israel
dailyNews.description: In guidance to immigration officers, the administration describes participating in pro-Palestinian protests and criticizing Israel as “overwhelmingly negative” factors.

dailyNews.title: The 85-Year-Old Widow Snagged by Trump’s Immigration Crackdown
dailyNews.description: In her first interview since being deported, Marie-Thérèse Ross-Mahé, the French widow of a former G.I., recounted her experience in ICE detention.

dailyNews.title: Tennessee Passed a Slate of Immigration Bills. Here’s What They Do.
dailyNews.description: The Republican supermajority in the Tennessee General Assembly approved a series of immigrations bills, crafted in coordination with the White House.

dailyNews.title: As U.S. re-arms during ceasefire, long-term concerns emerge about munitions supplies
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration has sought to project confidence in the U.S. military's munitions stocks after more than a month of war with Iran, but long-term supply questions remain.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration now permits death by firing squad for federal cases
dailyNews.description: Death by firing squad is now reinstated in U.S. federal cases, according to a new policy announced on Friday by the Trump administration.
